surface_verification.justification: Test-harness (empirical calibration suite) + an opt-in CI workflow + an additive library capture seam (grade_context_captured). No application runtime surface (the grader is a read-only CLI/library, no UI/API/store/SSE). Verified by the full grade plugin suite (313 passed) AND an end-to-end LIVE empirical record of the proof subset (flask/express/request) over the real network + gh, which exercised fetch@SHA + projection + gh enrichment + record/replay + gallery. E2E has no application surface to drive.

behaviors.behavior: grade_context returns a ReportModel byte-identical to grade_context_captured(...).report after the additive capture refactor
captured GradeInputs round-trips through JSON and re-grades to the same grade/score
grade_from_fixture replays a recorded fixture OFFLINE to the identical live ReportModel
a fixture schema_version mismatch raises an actionable FixtureVersionError (refresh required)
parse_band_set parses single bands and ranges (A/B) and empty (edge)
assert_ordering enforces exemplary > average > poor across tiers (n/a-safe, tie-safe within tier)
the recorded gh audit log is redacted (no raw stdout body) and RecordingGh passes input_text through
a no-signal repo (no tests/CI) grades without crashing; unmeasurable dims stay honest n/a
the runner replays a tmp cache, asserts bands + ordering, writes the gallery index + per-repo report
a pinned entry with no fixture FAILS in strict/CI (no green-but-empty gate) and loud-skips locally
record_repo/project_fixture rejects an authoritative target (grade_inputs None) with a clear error
open_target_at_sha rejects a non-40-hex SHA before any network call
preflight_network flags missing git, unauthenticated gh, and returns ready when both present
repos.yaml manifest is well-formed, pins real SHAs, spans the calibration spread, lists best-to-worst
fetch@SHA (depth-500 shallow + treeless-clone fallback) fetches a real repo at a pinned commit
behaviors.evidence: covered empirically by the live proof-subset record (flask/express/request fetched + graded successfully this session)

behaviors.behavior: record_repo remote fetch + gh enrichment against a real public repo
behaviors.evidence: covered empirically by the live proof-subset record

behaviors.behavior: the opt-in CI launch-gate workflow (grade-empirical.yml) records + asserts + uploads the gallery
behaviors.evidence: GitHub Actions runner; validated on workflow_dispatch. Shell hardened against input injection; least-privilege token.

behaviors.behavior: the per-repo HTML report render (render_html) content
behaviors.evidence: G3 tests/test_html_report.py + test_html_security.py cover render_html; gallery only wraps it
